benefits.description: Best sleep in years from first night; 6+ hours of deep, restful sleep; feeling of teleporting from night to morning with no memory of sleep process
Increased recovery was an original goal; improved repair during sleep
Fat loss was an original goal; no specific outcome reported yet

side_effects.description: Slight injection site irritation for a minute afterwards

protocol_notes: Obtained through Evolve HRT telemedicine clinic. Also on TRT through same clinic. Previously used BPC-157 for dislocated knee with great results. Dosing 1 hour to 30 minutes prior to bed, with last meal at least 1 hour before injection. Vial concentration: 2mg/2ml. Also mentioned interest in trying Sermorelin in the future.
